title: Cross-Project Overlap Audit & Factory Governance
summary: Audited 7 conversations for overlap with Factory analysis. Key finding: ship.ps1 handles release, Factory handles full lifecycle — complementary, not duplicated. Standard Nine skills already distributed. Branch strategy unified. What's genuinely new: Factory Lite (3-station orchestration), claim-task, spec-first, factory-manager script, night-shift. What to skip: Gatekeeper (covered by ship.ps1), Pre-PR (covered by ship.ps1).
